title: BreachHound Input Schema
description: Configure the email address to audit and settings for the scan.

email.title: Email Address
email.description: Enter the email address you want to audit for associated online accounts.

onlyUsed.title: Return Only Found Accounts
onlyUsed.description: When enabled, only services where an account was found will be included in the output. Disable this to return all services, including "not_found" and "rate_limited".

useResidentialProxy.title: Use Apify Residential Proxies (Recommended)
useResidentialProxy.description: Uses Apify Residential Proxies to significantly reduce rate limiting and improve detection coverage. If disabled, requests will be sent directly.

maxRetries.title: Maximum Retries
maxRetries.description: Maximum number of retry attempts for failed requests.
maxRetries.sectionDescription: Optional configuration for handling rate limits and timeouts.
